verses.text: Hih thu teng a pian' khit, Kumpipa Ahasueras' hehna a dam ciangin, amah in Vashti phawkin, Vashti' gamtatna leh amah tawh kisai-in a thupiakna zong thei hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa' nasemte in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa-a' dingin a melhoih nungak khangnote zongsak in

Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi-a numeite' omna-ah a melhoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipihna dingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuhah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk, kumpipa' innsungmang Hegai' kep dingin ki-ap hen. Tua ciangin tua numeite tungah paknamtui tuamtuam kiguan' hen
Tua sung panin kumpipa' deih bel nungak pen Vashti' tangin kumpinu suak hen,” a ci uh hi. Kumpipa in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa a, tua bangin a gamta hi
Tu-in kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Benjamin minam Kish, a tapa Shimei, a tapa Jair, a tapa Mordekai a kici Jew mi khat om hi
Amah pen, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin Judah kumpipa Jekoniah tawh a lak galmatte laka kihel khat ahi hi

Amah in a innlak pate khat' tanu, a min masa Hadassah, a nung ciangin Esther a kici, a khoi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a nu leh a pa om nawnlo hi. Tua numei melhoihin a ngaihbaang mahmah khat hi a, a nu leh a pa a sih ciangin Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak ahi hi
Kumpipa' thupiakna kithei kimin, Hegai' kep dingin ap dingin kumpi khua Susa khuapi-ah numei tampi hong kipaipih ciangin, numeite a uk Hegai' tungah ap dingin kumpipa' inn-ah Esther zong kipaipih hi

Amah in tua nungak hoihsa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite leh a annek ding pia pah a, kumpipa' innsung panin a kiteel nasem numei sagih zong guan' a, amah leh a nasem numeite' tungah numeite' omna a hoihpen mun a pia pah hi
Mordekai in kham ahih manin Esther in ama namlephung genkhialo hi
Esther bangci om a, ama tungah bang piang hiam cih a theihna dingin numeite' omna inntual mai-ah nisimin Mordekai va pai zel hi
Numeite a kigin' hun a vekpi-in kha sawmlenih sung hi a, sathau leh myrrh paknamtui tawh kha guk sung kipuahin, paknamtui tuamtuamte leh kipuahna dangte tawh kha guk sung mah kipuah uh hi
Kigin'kholhna hun cing a, Kumpipa Ahasueras' kiangah numeite a pai ciangin numeite' omna panin kumpipa' inn-ah a deih peuhpeuh uh kikengsak hi

Nitakin kumpipa kiangah va pai a, a zingsang ciangin numeite' omna a mun dang khatah kiciahsak a, kumpipa' zineute a uk, kumpipa' innsungmang Shaashgaz in kem hi. Kumpipa in a deihkik kei leh kumpipa kiangah paikik nawnlo a, kumpipa in a deih leh a minin kisamkik hi

Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihail' tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun' ciangin, numeite a uk kumpipa' innsungmangpa Hegai' gen teng lobuang kizepna ding puan dang bangmah ngenthuah lo hi. Tu-in Esther a mu mi peuhmah in hoihsa kim uh hi
Ama uk a kum sagihna, kha sawmna ahi Tebeth kha sungin kumpi innsung Kumpi Ahasueras' kiangah Esther a kipaipih ciangin
kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin itzaw a, a nungak dangte khempeuh sangin limbawl zaw hi. Tua hi a, kumpi lukhu amah khusakin Vashti' tangin kumpinu a suaksak hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante leh a nasem khempeuh-a' dingin pawi lianpi khat a bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuhah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khakna ding uh zong thu zasak kim a, kumpipa min tawh a kilawm a kituak letsongte zong a hawmkhia hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kumpipa a Kisawmsimna Thu Mordekai in Pulak

verses.text: Tua hun sungin Mordekai in kumpi nasep a ngah hi
Ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a, a innkuan ahi zongin pulaklo hi. Mordekai' kep sungin ama thu a man' mah bangin tu-in zong Mordekai' gen bangin gamta hi
Ni khat, kumpi nasemin Mordekai a om hun sungin kongcing ahi kumpipa' innsungmangte Bigthana leh Teresh heh uh a, Kumpipa Ahasueras thah ding a sawm uh hi
Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a, Esther in Mordekai' hong thupuak, ci-in kumpipa kiangah a gensawn hi
A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nihte gel kikhailum hi. Hih thupiangte khempeuh kumpipa' theihin Kumpi Gam Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi.
